_doc: kg-hub ingest filter — gates obs entering kg-hub from claude-mem.db (claude_mem_obs.py path). NOTE: config + code are BAKED into the image (compose has no bind-mount of config/ or src); edits do NOT hot-reload — a change requires rebuild + recreate of the container that runs claude_mem_obs. load_config() re-reads the (baked) file each ingester run, so 'hot-reload' only means within a running container, not host-file edits. shadow_mode is currently false (filter actively blocks). ops_noise.enabled currently false (unarmed).
_ops_noise_doc: 运维自指 bugfix 专项签名（WS-3/WS-4/WS-2 共用）。判据=type==bugfix ∧ 文本含 self_markers ∧ 命中>=N 运维词。self_markers 用文本标记而非 project（WS-4 实测：运维 obs 的 project 全是 workspace_claudeCode，区分不了）。enabled=false 时未武装：分类器仍供体检器读，过滤器不据此惩罚。WS-3 replay 达标后才 flip enabled=true。
_delivery_tiering_doc: G5 交付分层：对'按 score 排 Episodic'的交付面(canonical_context pass-2/episode_search)做 type 软加权+探索地板。enabled=false=inert(行为与今日一致，仅供 G6-lite 采基线)；离线验证见 tools/delivery_replay.py。config baked，flip enabled=true 需 rebuild(canary 微 gate)。
